title: Superpower
Description
Category
Activation Condition
table-718-718.caption: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man.
data: Possesses superhuman strength, capable of lifting several tons.
Can run and react at superhuman speeds, far exceeding human limits.
Exhibits superhuman endurance, allowing prolonged physical exertion.
His body is more resistant to physical injury than an ordinary human.
Ability to perceive Skrulls in their true three-dimensional form, even when disguised.
Achieves flight, sometimes attributed to his suit or inherent ability.
Recovers from injuries and fatigue at a much faster rate than normal.
